title: Heap Allocation Contracts and Failure Handling · Memory Trace: Malloc Calloc Contracts
summary: A batch importer assumes allocation succeeds and treats zero-byte requests differently across supported C libraries. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem malloc calloc contracts increment in allocation wrapper with explicit outcomes. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Apply malloc and calloc size, initialization, alignment, zero-size, and failure contracts without dereferencing assumptions.
Trace every stored or returned pointer back to its referent lifetime, including compound literals and callback contexts.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
